description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On August 9, 2024 at 12:08 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle ("Waymo AV") operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a fence on Pacific Avenue at Sansome Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was entering a parking lot on Pacific Avenue between Sansome Street and Battery Street when the front right sensor made 
contact with a fence. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV's Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV 
sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
